titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 574

p.seg: David, king of the Scots, to earls, justices, barons, sheriffs, provosts, officials, and all his worthy men, French and English, of his entire land, as much future as present, greeting.

Know me to have conceded to God and Saint Cuthbert [and to the monks of Coldingham a toft] with dwellings ... ... which Gilbert the priest of Stichill held of me [rendering] to me each year two shillings, and by this writing free from ... ... any service. I also grant to them the aforesaid land as ... ...to hold in feu and in alms.
Present as witnesses: Hugh de Morville, Robert son of Guy, Swain the priest of Fishwick.
